violations.text: Raw animal foods (shelled eggs, liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (deli meats) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
Food was observed not date marked in the refrigerator. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

Per employee, hands are dipped in a bucket of bleach water before putting on gloves. Employees must wash their hands with soap and water before putting on gloves. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024
The handwashing sink in the kitchen is lacking soap. Handwashing sinks must be provided with soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

The ice machine was observed with an accumulation of biofilm on the food contact surfaces. Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is cleaned. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024
Food was observed not date marked in the refrigerator. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

The chlorine sanitizing solution for the sanitizing solution for the sanitizing bucket was observed in excess of 200 ppm. A chlorine sanitizing solution must be 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024
Proper cooling methods were not used. A whole turkey breast was observed cooling. Large pieces of meat must be cut up when cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

Contamination was not prevented during food storage. Bread was observed stored on the floor in the kitchen and corn and onions stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be at least 6 inches off the ground. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

Several previously prepared food items in refrigeration were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023

At the time of inspection, the following equipment non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris... - The 2 Door Reach-In Cooler fan units were observed to have a build up of dust, dirt, debris - The bottom of the storage area of the 2 Door Reach-In Freezer was observed to have an accumulation of food debris New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023

The dumpster outside is located on gravel/dirt/grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023
